message:
Merge PR #2697: gt dolt status: verify databases are served, not just present on disk

FindBrokenWorkspaces now queries the running Dolt server to verify
databases are actually being served, not just present on the filesystem.
Catches cases where server was started from a different data directory.
Non-fatal: falls back to filesystem-only checks if server unreachable.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2697
Author: Random-Word

Co-authored-by: Ross Story <rostory@microsoft.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
